creator: marko@kind.ki.informatik.uni-frankfurt.de
text:
How-To-Repeat: 

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	mercury
#	mercury/Makefile
#	mercury/files
#	mercury/files/md5
#	mercury/patches
#	mercury/patches/patch-aa
#	mercury/patches/patch-af
#	mercury/patches/patch-ab
#	mercury/patches/patch-ac
#	mercury/patches/patch-ad
#	mercury/patches/patch-ae
#	mercury/pkg
#	mercury/pkg/DESCR
#	mercury/pkg/COMMENT
#	mercury/pkg/PLIST
#
echo c - mercury
mkdir -p mercury > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mercury/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/Makefile << 'END-of-mercury/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	mercury 
X# Version required:	beta after 0.7.3
X# Date created:		19981020
X# By:			Marko Sch"utz <marko@cs.uni-frankfurt.de>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	mercury
XCATEGORIES=	lang
XPKGNAME=	mercury-compiler-0.8
XPLIST=		${WRKDIR}/.PLIST
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://turiel.cs.mu.oz.au/pub/mercury/beta-releases/ \
X		ftp://ftp.univie.ac.at/systems/linux/metalab/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://sunsite.cnlab-switch.ch/mirror/linux/sunsite/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://pigpen.bl.physik.tu-muenchen.de/pub/comp/os/unix/linux/sunsite/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.rz.uni-karlsruhe.de/pub/disk/2/linux/mirror.sunsite/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.uni-magdeburg.de/pub/mirror/linux/sunsite.unc.edu/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://sunsite.auc.dk/disk1/sunsite.unc.edu/pub/Linux/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.cnr.it/pub/Linux/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.flashnet.it/mirror5/sunsite.unc.edu/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.germany.eu.net/public/pub/systems/Linux/Mirror.SunSITE/devel/lang/mercury/ \
X		ftp://ftp.surfnet.nl/mirror/linux/devel/lang/mercury/ 
X
XDISTFILES=	mercury-compiler-0.8.tar.gz #\
X#                mercury-extras-0.8.tar.gz
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/mercury-compiler-0.8
XCC=		gcc
X
XMAINTAINER=	marko@cs.uni-frankfurt.de
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX}/${PKGNAME}
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
X
Xpost-extract:
X	rm ${WRKSRC}/doc/texinfo.tex
X 
Xdo-install:
X.if defined(USE_GMAKE)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${INSTALL_TARGET})
X.if defined(USE_IMAKE) && !defined(NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} install.man)
X.endif
X.else defined(USE_GMAKE)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${INSTALL_TARGET})
X.if defined(USE_IMAKE) && !defined(NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} install.man)
X.endif
X.endif
X	echo '@name '${PKGNAME} >${PLIST}
X	echo '@cwd '${PREFIX}/${PKGNAME} >>${PLIST}
X	(cd ${PREFIX}/${PKGNAME}; pwd;\
X	 find . \! -type d \! -type l | cut -c 3- >>${PLIST} ;\
X	 for i in info/mercury_*.info ; do \
X	   echo "@exec install-info $$i ${PREFIX}/info/dir" >>${PLIST}; \
X	 done ;\
X	 find . -type l | cut -c 3- | sort -r | xargs -n 1 printf '@unexec rm %%D/%s\n' >>${PLIST} ;\
X	 find . -type d | cut -c 3- | sort -r | xargs -n 1 echo '@dirrm ' >>${PLIST}) 
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-mercury/Makefile
echo c - mercury/files
mkdir -p mercury/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mercury/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/files/md5 << 'END-of-mercury/files/md5'
XMD5 (mercury-compiler-0.8.tar.gz) = 21e7ccfe5e2a7ad34ed6a171ca81d17f
END-of-mercury/files/md5
echo c - mercury/patches
mkdir -p mercury/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mercury/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-mercury/patches/patch-aa'
X*** ../../tmp/mercury-compiler-0.8/boehm_gc/mach_dep.c	Tue Sep  1 01:05:16 1998
X--- boehm_gc/mach_dep.c	Tue Jan 26 15:38:26 1999
X***************
X*** 169,176 ****
X  #   endif	/* MACOS */
X  
X  #       if defined(I386) &&!defined(OS2) &&!defined(SVR4) &&!defined(MSWIN32) \
X! 	&& !defined(SCO) && !defined(SCO_ELF) && !(defined(LINUX) \
X! 	&& defined(__ELF__)) && !defined(DOS4GW)
X  	/* I386 code, generic code does not appear to work */
X  	/* It does appear to work under OS2, and asms dont */
X  	/* This is used for some 38g UNIX variants and for CYGWIN32 */
X--- 169,176 ----
X  #   endif	/* MACOS */
X  
X  #       if defined(I386) &&!defined(OS2) &&!defined(SVR4) &&!defined(MSWIN32) \
X! 	&& !defined(SCO) && !defined(SCO_ELF) && !((defined(LINUX) \
X!           || defined(__FreeBSD__)) && defined(__ELF__)) && !defined(DOS4GW)
X  	/* I386 code, generic code does not appear to work */
X  	/* It does appear to work under OS2, and asms dont */
X  	/* This is used for some 38g UNIX variants and for CYGWIN32 */
X***************
X*** 183,189 ****
X  	  asm("pushl %ebx");  asm("call _GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
X  #       endif
X  
X! #	if defined(I386) && defined(LINUX) && defined(__ELF__)
X  	/* This is modified for Linux with ELF (Note: _ELF_ only) */
X  	  asm("pushl %eax");  asm("call GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
X  	  asm("pushl %ecx");  asm("call GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
X--- 183,190 ----
X  	  asm("pushl %ebx");  asm("call _GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
X  #       endif
X  
X! #	if defined(I386) && (defined(LINUX) || defined(__FreeBSD__)) \
X!           && defined(__ELF__)
X  	/* This is modified for Linux with ELF (Note: _ELF_ only) */
X  	  asm("pushl %eax");  asm("call GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
X  	  asm("pushl %ecx");  asm("call GC_push_one"); asm("addl $4,%esp");
END-of-mercury/patches/patch-aa
echo x - mercury/patches/patch-af
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/patches/patch-af << 'END-of-mercury/patches/patch-af'
X*** ../../tmp/mercury-compiler-0.8/doc/user_guide.texi	Mon Nov 16 11:38:25 1998

X+ @direntry
X+ * User Guide: (mercury_user_guide).  The Mercury User's Guide.
X+ @end direntry
X  
X  @ignore

END-of-mercury/patches/patch-af

END-of-mercury/patches/patch-ab

X! END-INFO-DIR-ENTRY

X

X--- 1,10 ----
X  \input texinfo

X  @settitle The Mercury Library Reference Manual

X  
X  @c @smallbook

END-of-mercury/patches/patch-ac

X*** ../../tmp/mercury-compiler-0.8/doc/reference_manual.texi	Mon Nov  9 14:30:44 1998

END-of-mercury/patches/patch-ad

END-of-mercury/patches/patch-ae
echo c - mercury/pkg
mkdir -p mercury/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mercury/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-mercury/pkg/DESCR'
XThis is a port of mercury, the logic functional language developed at
XMelbourne University. 
X
XIts home is at 
X
X	http://www.cs.mu.oz.au/research/mercury/
X
X
XMarko
X
Xmarko@cs.uni-frankfurt.deEND-of-mercury/pkg/DESCR

sed 's/^X//' >mercury/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-mercury/pkg/COMMENT'
XCompiler for the logic functional language mercury.END-of-mercury/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - mercury/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >mercury/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-mercury/pkg/PLIST'
